SEARCH
Package controller

Class NewGamePanelController

java.lang.Object
controller.BaseController
controller.NewGamePanelController
public class NewGamePanelController extends BaseController
Controller class for managing actions and interactions with the NewGamePanel.

  • Constructor Details

    • NewGamePanelController

      private NewGamePanelController()
      Private constructor to initialize NewGamePanelController. Creates action listeners for avatar buttons and sets up action listeners for the back button and start game button on the NewGamepanel.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static NewGamePanelController getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of NewGamePanelController.
      Returns:
      The instance of NewGamePanelController.

    • createTheGame

      private void createTheGame(Integer opponents)
      Method to create a new game with specified number of opponents.
      Parameters:
      opponents - Number of opponents in the game.

    • insertPlayers

      public static void insertPlayers(view.GamePanel gp, Player hp, List<Player> oc, ModelManager mm)
      Method to insert players into the GamePanel and ModelManager.
      Parameters:
      gp - GamePanel instance to update.
      hp - Human player instance.
      oc - Opponents collection.
      mm - ModelManager instance to update.

    • createOpponent

      private void createOpponent(int numberPlayer, List<Player> opponentsCollection, List<String> remainingAvatars)
      Method to create an opponent player.
      Parameters:
      numberPlayer - Player number.
      opponentsCollection - Collection of opponents.
      remainingAvatars - Remaining avatar names.

    • createSaveGame

      private int createSaveGame(view.GamePanel gp)
      Method to create a save game.
      Parameters:
      gp - GamePanel instance.
      Returns:
      The save number created.

    • numberOfSaves

      public static int numberOfSaves()
      Method to count the number of saves.
      Returns:
      The number of save games present.

    • addAvatarButtonListeners

      private void addAvatarButtonListeners()
      Method to add ActionListener to all avatar buttons.
